li.label: poor medal ceremony
li.description: I was given a medal, but the ceremony was underwhelming. Barely anyone showed up.

li.label: awarded a medal
li.description: I was recognized for my service. It was a decent ceremony.

li.label: grand medal ceremony
li.description: I was recognized for my service before the whole colony. It is an honor to wear this.

li.label: legendary medal ceremony
li.description: The entire colony gathered to honor me. I will never forget this moment.

li.label: witnessed medal ceremony
li.description: I watched one of our own be honored for their service. It was moving.
